name: pi-herd
description: Visible Pi session orchestration through Herdr panes and git worktrees.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/cli.ts src/herdr-plugin-action.ts src/herdr-plugin-pane.ts src/pi-extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outdir=dist --outbase=src "--banner:js=import { createRequire } from 'node:module';const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"

author: Ribbons Digital
